segments.original_text: 上はここはヤマナクション選手

segments.text: Whiff punish with the dash attack!
segments.original_text: ダッシュアタックで差し返す

segments.text: Going for pressure from below the platform
segments.original_text: 台下から圧を加えたい

segments.text: The rising up air didn't connect, but grabbed it with a jab and keeps the turn rolling!
segments.original_text: 登り空上は当たらなかったんですが弱で拾ってターン継続

full_text: Upper here - player Yamana Whiff punish with the dash attack! Going for pressure from below the platform Falling up air? The rising up air didn't connect, but grabbed it with a jab and keeps the turn rolling! Wait, dair? KO!
